bot.role: Clenow-style vol-normalized trend rotation. Universe SPY/QQQ/IWM/EFA/TLT/GLD/DBC (7 ETF), close > 100d MA = include, inverse 30d std weighting, weekly rebal with 5% hysteresis. backtest (E4) 9 years: Sharpe +0.98 vs SPY +0.90, maxDD -24% vs -34%. 2020 COVID +35% (SPY +18%), 2022 bear -8.5% (SPY -18%) = bull/bear дёЎ regime гҒ§з”ҹеӯҳгҖӮdefensive complement roleгҖӮsleeve 10% NetLiq totalгҖӮuser 2026-06-20 й…ҚеӮҷжүҝиӘҚгҖӮ

bot.subtitle: AI infra theme broad basket. Static 12 (semi + GEV/VRT/KEYS/TER) + еӢ•зҡ„ working_universe top 10гҖӮbull regime (>=5/8 v2) гҒ®гҒҝ entryгҖҒbear гҒ§е…Ё exitгҖҒ14d rebalгҖӮ0.8% Г— 12 = 9.6% NetLiqгҖӮF3 theme amplification жҲҰз•ҘгҖӮ2026-06-20 й…ҚеӮҷ

stats.annual_est: theme follow + dynamic inputгҖҒforward 25-50% жңҹеҫ… if regime hold
stats.r6: working_universe top 30 гҒ§ AI/semi/infra гҒҢ 60% еҚ жңү
stats.placebo: theme decay гғӘгӮ№гӮҜгҖҒbear regime гҒ§е…Ё exit + working_universe гҒ§еӢ•зҡ„е…ҘгӮҢжӣҝгҒҲ

bot.role: AI infra broad basket with dynamic working_universe expansion. Static 12 (SNDK/MU/INTC/WDC/STX/AMD/LRCX/AMAT/GEV/VRT/KEYS/TER) + dynamic top 10 from working_universe.json. Bull regime (>=5/8 v2) gated, bear гҒ§е…Ё exitгҖҒ14d rebalгҖҒ21d holdгҖӮ0.8% Г— 12 = 9.6% NetLiqгҖӮF3 theme amplification жҲҰз•ҘгҖӮuser 2026-06-20 жүҝиӘҚгҖӮ
